title: calamus papuanus
intro: Calamus papuanus is a type of plant species, also known as Sweet Calamus or Papua Sweetroot, belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamus papuanus include alleviating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Calamus papuanus is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
